text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At summer camp, Maruzensky and I work hard to improve her running
even further. Maruzensky is in high spirits as the sun rises on the final
day.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. Come on! We need our last day of training to
be a good one!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. Come on! We need our last day of training to
be a good one!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: This is it, you know? So let's rev up and go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An invigorated Maruzensky pushes through the final day of training
with me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thanks, Trainer! Hehe, looks like we both worked up a sweat.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thanks, Trainer! Hehe, looks like we both worked up a sweat.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm exhausted, but like, exhilarated at the same time. I feel
fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
After all this training, I can't wait for my next race. Hehe, I think you'll
enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But hey... Are you all right? Aren't you tired from being under the sun
for so long?
choice_data_list: I'll be fine once I rest up.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But hey... Are you all right? Aren't you tired from being under the sun
for so long?
choice_data_list: I'll be fine once I rest up.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You sure? Don't overdo it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm gonna head back and wash up. It's important to get plenty
of rest after a big workout!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go back to my room and take a relaxing bath. Afterwards, I head
outside to get some cool night air...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know what Trainer said, but we had a really tiring day. I hope I'm not
being selfish...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Um... I heard from another student that there's a festival going on at
the shrine near here.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, I'll just ask!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wanna grab dinner at the food stalls there?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's supposed to be game stalls too, and they're doing a festival
dance! I bet we'd have a great time together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay! With that decided, I'm going to dance my socks off at the
dance!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer! This way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer! This way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wooow! It's so crowded, isn't it? I really wanna check out this one stall, but I can't see it anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. ♪ It isn't just any old stall. Ready for this?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's a dessert shop, and it's fresh to the max!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All of the students are saying the summer-only Deluxe Carrot Tower
Parfaits are totally off the hook.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little worried they'll sell out since they're so popular, but we
should save dessert for later.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know what we have to do first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Da, da, dum, ba, ba, bum. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There! The dance! Aw, this takes me back... My family used to dance
all the time when I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's go! It's time to get our groove on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We join the dance, and Maruzensky performs beautifully. Everyone
there is feeling the excitement.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wooo! We're not done yet! Come on, Trainer! Feeling jiggy?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wooo! We're not done yet! Come on, Trainer! Feeling jiggy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As the event heats up even more, the dance grows too big to contain.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! What fun! You dance pretty well, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! What fun! You dance pretty well, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It was! Everyone was really jamming out! I got so carried away I wound
up on the main platform. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My whole body was rumbling from standing next to the taiko drums! It
was just the best!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My mother always used to say, "When you stand on the big stage, it's
time to boogie down." Hehe, I guess the apple doesn't fall far from
the tree.
choice_data_list: Ah, so you got it from your mother...
Ah, so you got it from your mother...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! We need to go get our dessert!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's go find a Deluxe Carrot Tower Parfait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get our carrot parfaits and enjoy the other stalls. After seeing all
there is to see, it's time to head back.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That parfait was fabulous! It even had ice cream between the
macarons... My heart's as full as my stomach. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I got to run along the ocean, join the festival dance, and eat a rad
new dessert...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I never thought I'd get to spend such a good time with someone.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it was so much fun. Promise we can do it again sometime?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you don't need to think about it more?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you don't need to think about it more?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you say yes to everything, who knows where my whims will take you
next?
choice_data_list: Whatever it is, bring it on!
Whatever it is, bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, please, I know you're tired... But that's right! We should plan
our next outing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...It's really weird though. I feel like I can be myself with you, even
more than when I'm alone.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...It's really weird though. I feel like I can be myself with you, even
more than when I'm alone.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Like I can go anywhere, run however far—anything. That's how you
make me feel, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Like I can go anywhere, run however far—anything. That's how you
make me feel, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I don't know how you do it... You really are something special!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I don't know how you do it... You really are something special!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wow! I guess we're a good match, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of embarrassing to say this, but... I hope we get to keep
sharing a lot more fun.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: A racer and her trainer—the best of partners! Here's to us!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: A racer and her trainer—the best of partners! Here's to us!
